models.name: Doubao-Seed-Code (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: Coding Plan Code model. Doubao programming model, deeply optimized for Agentic programming tasks, with accurate code generation, task scheduling, and logical collaboration capabilities.

models.name: Doubao-Seed-2.0-Code (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: Coding Plan Code model. Coding model optimized for real-world programming environments, capable of stably calling tools in common IDEs like Claude Code. Model specially optimized for frontend capabilities, performing well when using common frontend frameworks. Model supports using Skills, can be used with various custom skills.

models.name: Doubao-Seed-2.0-lite (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: Coding Plan Code model. Balancing generation quality and response speed, suitable as a general production-grade model, capable of unstructured information processing, content creation, search recommendation, data analysis, and other production work.

models.name: Doubao-Seed-2.0-pro (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: Coding Plan Code model. Flagship-level all-around general model, suitable for complex reasoning and long-chain task execution scenarios, emphasizing multimodal understanding, long-context reasoning, structured generation, and tool-enhanced execution.

models.name: Kimi-K2.6 (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: Coding Plan Code model. Possesses strong thinking capabilities, supports multi-step tool calling and reasoning, excels at solving complex problems such as complex logical reasoning, math problems, and code writing.

models.name: Kimi-K2.5 (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: Coding Plan Code model. Moonshot AI's latest programming model, further strengthening frontend code quality and design expression capabilities.

models.name: GLM-5.1 (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: Coding Plan Code model. Zhipu's new generation flagship model, enhanced code capabilities, significantly improved long-range tasks, capable of working continuously and autonomously for up to 8 hours in a single task.

models.name: GLM-4.7 (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: Coding Plan Code model. Zhipu AI's flagship code large model, capable of easily parsing super-long codebases, handling complex agent (Agent) tasks, excelling in code generation, debugging, and full-link understanding scenarios.

models.name: MiniMax-M2.7 (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: Coding Plan Code model. M2.7 can autonomously build complex Agent Harness, and based on Agent Teams, complex Skills, Tool capabilities, complete highly complex productivity tasks.

models.name: MiniMax-M2.5 (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: Coding Plan Code model. MiniMax's flagship open-source large model, reaching or refreshing industry SOTA in programming, tool calling and search, office and other productivity scenarios.

models.name: Deepseek V3.2 (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: Coding Plan Code model. DeepSeek-V3.2, balancing reasoning capability and output length, stable and efficient in general Q&A, daily Agent tasks, and lightweight code development scenarios, adapting to diverse AI needs.

models.name: Doubao-Seed-2.0-Code (Agent Plan)
models.tooltip: Agent Plan model. Relying on Seed 2.0 Agent and VLM capabilities, enhanced code capabilities: outstanding frontend, multi-language adaptation, suitable for connecting to various AI programming tools. Default non-thinking, supports enabling deep thinking.

models.name: Doubao-Seed-2.0-pro (Agent Plan)
models.tooltip: Agent Plan model. Flagship-level all-around general model, suitable for complex reasoning and long-chain task execution scenarios, emphasizing multimodal understanding, long-context reasoning, structured generation, and tool-enhanced execution. Default thinking, supports disabling deep thinking.

models.name: Doubao-Seed-2.0-lite (Agent Plan)
models.tooltip: Agent Plan model. Balancing generation quality and response speed, suitable as a general production-grade model, capable of unstructured information processing, content creation, search recommendation, data analysis, and other production work. Default thinking, supports disabling deep thinking.

models.name: Doubao-Seed-2.0-mini (Agent Plan)
models.tooltip: Agent Plan model. Designed for low-latency, high-concurrency, and cost-sensitive scenarios, providing extreme model reasoning speed, suitable for cost and speed-prioritized lightweight tasks. Default thinking, supports disabling deep thinking.

models.name: GLM-5.1 (Agent Plan)
models.tooltip: Agent Plan model. Zhipu's new generation flagship model, open-source version. Default thinking, supports disabling deep thinking.

models.name: MiniMax-M2.7 (Agent Plan)
models.tooltip: Agent Plan model. M2.7 can autonomously build complex Agent Harness, and based on Agent Teams, complex Skills, Tool capabilities, complete highly complex productivity tasks. Default thinking, supports disabling deep thinking.

models.name: Kimi-K2.6 (Agent Plan)
models.tooltip: Agent Plan model. Moonshot AI's new generation intelligent model. Default thinking, supports disabling deep thinking.

models.name: DeepSeek-V3.2 (Agent Plan)
models.tooltip: Agent Plan model. Balancing reasoning capability and output length, stable and efficient in general Q&A, daily Agent tasks, and lightweight code development scenarios, adapting to diverse AI needs. Default non-thinking, supports enabling deep thinking.

models.name: Doubao-Seed-2.0-Code-preview-260215
models.tooltip: Doubao-Seed-2.0-Code optimized for enterprise-level programming needs, on the basis of Seed 2.0's excellent Agent and VLM capabilities, specially enhanced code capabilities, not only outstanding frontend capabilities but also special optimization for enterprise common multi-language coding needs, suitable for connecting to various AI programming tools.

models.name: Doubao-Seed-2.0-mini-260428
models.tooltip: Doubao-Seed-2.0-mini-260428 new version, capable of simultaneously inputting and understanding video, images, audio, and text four modalities, and performing cross-modal joint reasoning, directly processing business requirements that must combine audio and video for judgment.

models.name: Doubao-Seed-2.0-lite-260428
models.tooltip: Doubao-Seed-2.0-lite-260428 new version, supporting native unified understanding of video, images, audio, and text, is the first full-modality understanding model in the Doubao large model family, simultaneously upgrading Agent, Coding, and GUI capabilities. Under the same compute cost, it is a more cost-effective choice for enterprise large-scale, batch deployment of full-modality reasoning tasks.

models.name: Doubao-Seed-2.0-Pro-260215
models.tooltip: Doubao-Seed-2.0-pro is a flagship-level all-around general model, designed for complex reasoning and long-chain task execution scenarios in the Agent era. Emphasizing multimodal understanding, long-context reasoning, structured generation, and tool-enhanced execution. Outstanding complex instruction and multi-constraint execution capabilities, stably handling multi-step complex planning, complex image-text reasoning, video content understanding, and high-difficulty analysis scenarios.

models.name: Doubao-Seed-1.8-251228
models.tooltip: New model specifically optimized for multimodal Agent scenarios. Stronger Agent capabilities, upgraded multimodal understanding, more flexible context management.

models.name: Doubao-Seed-1.8-251228 (Caching)
models.tooltip: New model specifically optimized for multimodal Agent scenarios. Stronger Agent capabilities, upgraded multimodal understanding, more flexible context management.

models.name: DeepSeek-V3.2-251201
models.tooltip: DeepSeek-V3.2 official version, balancing reasoning capability and output length, suitable for daily use, such as Q&A scenarios and general Agent task scenarios

models.name: GLM-4.7-251222
models.tooltip: GLM-4.7 is Zhipu's latest flagship model, with stronger programming capabilities and more stable multi-step reasoning/execution capabilities. Significant improvement in executing complex agent tasks, while conversations are more natural and frontend aesthetics are better.

models.name: GLM-4.7-251222 (Caching)
models.tooltip: GLM-4.7 is Zhipu's latest flagship model, with stronger programming capabilities and more stable multi-step reasoning/execution capabilities. Significant improvement in executing complex agent tasks, while conversations are more natural and frontend aesthetics are better.
